title: Using Your Locker on Mobile
bodyHtml:
Your locker is designed to work great on your phone.

How it works on mobile

  • All four apps, always — To-do, Notes, Timer, and Pins are all there as swipeable pages
  • Swipe to switch — swipe left and right to move between apps
  • Page dots — the dots at the bottom show which app you're on. Tap a dot to jump to that page.

Inside each app

Creating lists, writing notes, setting timers, adding pins — it all works the same as on a computer. The screen is just smaller, so you see one app at a time instead of side-by-side.

What's different from desktop

The desktop view shows apps as panes you can rearrange, resize, and toggle on or off, with a toolbar at the top for changing the locker color and font. On mobile, every app is always available — there's no concept of "active" apps to manage.
description: How the locker works on your phone: swipe navigation and what's different from desktop.
